creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
I do have ~/.vimrc, still /usr/local/share/vim/vimrc effects vim behavior (and not in a way I would like, obviously).
On the latter suggestion, I enjoy using binary packages and I do not want to go back to port building or to managing a mixture of packages from different sources.
I can counter-suggest that perhaps a separate port / package should be created with the vimrc file for those who feel they need it.

P.S. I do not have any problem with /usr/local/share/vim/vimrc.sample being installed.
